---
title: "Soil Conditions at HARV (2018)"
author: "Nyah Noronha"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Introduction

This study compares soil conditions between May and August 2018 at the HARV NEON site. These months represent wetter and drier seasonal conditions.

# Methods

```{r}
soil_water <- read.csv("data/soil_water.csv")
soil_temp <- read.csv("data/soil_temp.csv")
soil_co2 <- read.csv("data/soil_co2.csv")
```

```{r}
names(soil_water)
names(soil_temp)
names(soil_co2)
```

# Results

```{r}
soil_water %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = VSWCMean)) +
  geom_histogram()
```
